rows.claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible
rows.definition: Random-initialized blind training with scaffold initializers disabled.
rows.denominator_rule: pure-blind suite rows only; scaffolds, warm starts, repairs, and perturbed starts excluded
rows.safe_public_claim: Only verifier-recovered rows in this class may support pure blind recovery rates.

rows.claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible
rows.definition: Blind training with declared structural scaffold initializers.
rows.denominator_rule: scaffolded rows are denominated separately from pure blind rows
rows.safe_public_claim: Useful optimizer evidence, but not pure blind discovery.

rows.claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible
rows.definition: Training initialized from a compiled EML expression.
rows.denominator_rule: warm_start rows are denominated separately from pure blind rows
rows.safe_public_claim: Basin or compiler-assisted evidence, not random-initialized discovery.

rows.claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible
rows.definition: Runs that return the exact compiled or known target AST.
rows.denominator_rule: same_ast rows are denominated separately from pure blind rows
rows.safe_public_claim: Strong representational and basin evidence, not discovery from scratch.

rows.claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible
rows.definition: Known true-tree starts perturbed before optimization.
rows.denominator_rule: perturbed_basin rows are denominated separately from pure blind rows
rows.safe_public_claim: Measures local basin stability, not blind search.

rows.claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible
rows.definition: Verifier-gated local repair or frozen-structure constant refit after snapping.
rows.denominator_rule: repair_refit rows are denominated separately from pure blind rows
rows.safe_public_claim: Post-snap improvement evidence, not the original optimizer discovery event.

rows.claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible
rows.denominator_rule: compile_only rows are denominated separately from pure blind rows
rows.safe_public_claim: Representation support or unsupported diagnostics, not training recovery.

rows.claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible
rows.definition: Rows blocked by support gates, compile depth, missing witnesses, or explicit unsupported status.
rows.denominator_rule: visible negative rows inside their original regime denominator
rows.safe_public_claim: Must remain visible in denominators where eligible and never count as recovered.

rows.claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible
rows.definition: Rows that ran but failed verifier recovery, snapping, or acceptable numerical criteria.
rows.denominator_rule: visible negative rows inside their original regime denominator
rows.safe_public_claim: Must remain visible and never count as recovered.
